# Shared-auth edge-function consumers — single source of truth for the deploy LIST.
#
# These functions import supabase/functions/_shared/** (the auth boundary —
# _shared/auth/requireTenantUser.ts, directly or via _shared/aiAuth.ts). Supabase
# bundles _shared at deploy time, so a _shared edit does NOT hot-update them — each
# must be redeployed to pick up the change. Both the redeploy workflow and the
# post-deploy verifier read this file, so the list lives in exactly one place.
#
# verify_jwt is NOT specified here — it is read per-function from supabase/config.toml
# at deploy time (the SSOT for that value). One function per line; '#' starts a comment.
#
# (outscraper-reviews carries its OWN inline copy of requireTenantUser rather than
# importing _shared, so a _shared edit can't change its bundle — but it is kept in the
# list so its verify_jwt is covered by the post-deploy assertion and a manual run can
# repair it too.)

apply-finding-fix
create-upgrade-session
zernio-analytics
gsc-analytics
ga4-analytics
generate-social-batch
seo-analytics
pagespeed-proxy
ai-proxy
notify-upgrade
post-to-social
tag-image-vision
notify-support-ticket
list-checkout-sessions
places-reviews
outscraper-reviews
